content: `/client/src/stores/game.ts` - Is the client's Pinia store through which all game methods and reactive variables are exposed. All of the systems in the game utilize these reactive variables and expose methods into this store. Components utilize the same reactive variables, and call methods from this store.

- AI Scrapyard follows a client-server architecture with clear separation of concerns.
